narrative:
Precinct Symmes (precinct in Lawrence County) has 292 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.9 percentage points.
